title: Painted Realms
description: This pack replaces some in-game paintings with iconic, historical, and artistic masterpieces, bringing a touch of real-world art into your Minecraft world. All artworks are carefully selected to enhance your creative experience.
body:
# 🎨 Craft Gallery - Resource Pack

## 🖼️ Description  
**Craft Gallery** replaces some in-game paintings with **iconic, historical, and artistic masterpieces**, bringing a touch of real-world art into your Minecraft world.  
All artworks are carefully selected to enhance your creative and aesthetic experience.  

![A photograph showing which pictures are included.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a1a6fbe1886b83b0874a54fc8e6f1a37f0d7c0b.jpeg)

## ⚙️ Setup  
1. Open **Minecraft** and go to **Settings → Resource Packs**.  
2. Drag and drop the **Craft Gallery** pack into the folder.  
3. Activate the pack and enjoy your new collection of classic paintings in-game.  

## 🧩 Used Works / In-Game Names  

![Used Works / In-Game Names](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0daf3793868bc8d1c909711b84f091df8e581614.jpeg)
